T0192.title: Phone Attribution Lookup
T0192.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to querying the carrier and geographic origin of a phone number, often used for precise targeting or correlation analysis of an individual.
T0192.description: In illicit data trading, refers to querying the carrier and geographic origin of a phone number, often used for precise targeting or correlation analysis of an individual.
T0192.usageExample: "Can filter by region, phone number origin, real-name verification, contact to order"
